questions.question_text: What is the main idea of the passage?
questions.student_answer: The main idea is that the boy is excited about the school trip.

questions.question_text: What does the word 'excited' mean in the passage?
questions.student_answer: Excited means very happy and eager.

questions.question_text: Why did the boy feel excited?
questions.student_answer: He felt excited because he was going on a school trip.

questions.question_text: What did the boy do before the trip?
questions.student_answer: He packed his bag and said goodbye to his family.

questions.question_text: What did the boy see on the trip?
questions.student_answer: He saw a beautiful lake and a forest.

questions.question_text: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence: 'The cat is ___ the table.'
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence: 'She is ___ a book.'
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence: 'They are ___ to the park.'
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence: 'He is ___ a ball.'
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence: 'We are ___ to the beach.'
Write a short paragraph about your favorite holiday.
questions.student_answer: My favorite holiday is Christmas. I love it because I get to spend time with my family and receive presents. We decorate the tree and have a big dinner. I also enjoy singing carols and watching the snow fall. It is a very special time of the year.

questions.question_text: Write a short paragraph about your favorite animal.
questions.student_answer: My favorite animal is the dog. I love dogs because they are loyal and friendly. They are great companions and always happy to see you. I have a golden retriever named Max who is very playful and loves to go for walks. Dogs are wonderful pets.

questions.question_text: Write a short paragraph about your favorite food.
questions.student_answer: My favorite food is pizza. I love pizza because it is delicious and comes in many flavors. I enjoy eating pepperoni and cheese pizza. I also like to add vegetables like mushrooms and onions. Pizza is a fun food to eat with friends and family.

questions.question_text: Write a story about a day at the beach.
questions.student_answer: It was a sunny day and I went to the beach with my family. We built a sandcastle and played in the waves. I found a seashell and gave it to my mom. We had a picnic and ate sandwiches and fruit. I swam in the ocean and saw fish. It was a fun day and I will never forget it.

Complete the following paragraph by using the verbs in brackets in the correct forms. Yesterday, Anna (wake).....up early. She (eat).....breakfast and (go).....to school. After school, she (play).....with her friends and (do).....her homework. In the evening, she (watch).....TV and (call).....her grandma. Tomorrow Anna will do three things. She (help).....her mum cook dinner. She (clean).....her room and she (study).....for her test.
questions.student_answer: woke, ate, went, played, did, watched, called, will help, will clean, will study

questions.question_text: New York is ... than Washington. (Write this adjective correctly and complete the sentence: good)
He dressed smartly. He wanted to attend the party. (Join these two sentences with ...in order to...)
Tom is very intelligent. He cannot fail this test. (Join the two sentences using: ...too....to...)
questions.student_answer: Tom is too intelligent to fail the test

questions.question_text: I like watching movies than reading stories. (Use: prefer...to)
questions.student_answer: I prefer watching movies to reading stories

questions.question_text: Kigali is a nice city. (Add a question tag)
questions.student_answer: Kigali is a nice city, isn't it?

In not more than 150 words, discuss the characteristics of good friends.
questions.student_answer: A good friend is a person with whom you share everything. He does not betray you when you share secrets. The good friend is always there to assist when in need. He thinks about you when there is an opportunity of promotion or a chance for development. A good friend will always be by your side in difficulties and in good times. He suffers with you and rejoices with you.
